skills.title: NEST voltage trace renderer
skills.description: Render multimeter/voltmeter analog traces (V_m, currents, conductances).

examples.dataShape: times_ms + V_m/current/conductance series split by sender
examples.output: Selectable trace, spike markers, JSON + SVG export
examples.note: Mirrors NEST voltage_trace while keeping data provenance inspectable.

skills.title: NEST spike raster renderer
skills.description: Render spike_recorder events as rasters, spike trains and population plots.

examples.dataShape: spike_recorder events: times_ms, senders, population labels
examples.output: Sender-time raster, population rate strip, selectable windows
examples.note: Use exact spike times first; aggregate only when too dense to read.

skills.title: NEST rate / IF response renderer
skills.description: Render firing-rate / IF curves and population rates derived from spike counts.

examples.output: IF curve, population-rate trace, decision crossing markers
examples.note: Always show bin width / counting window so rates stay auditable.

skills.title: NEST connectivity matrix renderer
skills.description: Render SynapseCollection connectivity, weights and population blocks.

examples.dataShape: sources, targets, weights, delays, source/target populations
examples.output: Topology node-edge view, selected block stats, weight histogram
examples.note: Keep absent connections distinct from zero-weight connections.

skills.title: NEST 2D spatial renderer
skills.description: Render 2D layer positions, masks, kernels and sampled projections.

examples.nestExample: Circular mask, Gaussian kernel, grid/free spatial examples
examples.dataShape: node x/y positions, masks, kernels, sampled edges
examples.output: No Cortexel scene yet — route to a 2D d3 map on the host.
examples.note: scene:null — render via host d3, not a Cortexel 3D scene.

skills.title: NEST 3D spatial renderer
skills.description: Render 3D population/node positions for spatial inspection.

examples.dataShape: node x/y/z positions, extent, sampled edges
examples.output: Selectable 3D scene plus SVG projection fallback
examples.note: Use 3D as inspection aid; do not imply biological geometry.

skills.title: NEST plasticity dynamics renderer
skills.description: Render STDP windows, weight adaptation and short-term dynamics.

examples.dataShape: weights, u/x resources, pre/post spikes, delta_t, delta_weight
examples.output: Weight trace, STDP window, spike protocol rugs
examples.note: Preserve pre/post sign convention; label all plasticity parameters.

skills.title: NEST phase-plane renderer
skills.description: Render phase planes, vector fields, nullclines and trajectories.

examples.nestExample: Numerical phase-plane analysis of the Hodgkin-Huxley neuron
examples.dataShape: state variable grid, derivatives, nullcline points, trajectory
examples.output: Vector field, nullclines, trajectory, equilibrium annotations
examples.note: Distinguish clamped state variables from simulated dynamic ones.

skills.title: NEST correlogram / synchrony renderer
skills.description: Render auto/cross-correlation functions for spike trains.

examples.nestExample: Auto- and crosscorrelation functions for spike trains
examples.dataShape: lags_ms, correlation values, pair labels, bin width
examples.output: No Cortexel scene (distinct from ISI) — route to host d3.
examples.note: scene:null — correlogram math differs from the ISI histogram scene.

skills.title: NEST stimulus-response protocol renderer
skills.description: Render aligned stimulus waveforms, responses, spikes and protocol epochs.

examples.nestExample: Sinusoidal generator / pulse packet / repeated stimulation
examples.dataShape: stimulus waveform, analog response, spike events, epochs
examples.output: Composite protocol panels — host-composed, no single scene.
examples.note: scene:null — multi-panel protocol composed by the host.

examples.output: Calcium/IP3 traces via the analog-trace scene (flagged derived)
examples.note: weak:true — keep glial and neuronal units explicitly separate.

skills.title: NEST compartmental morphology + dynamics renderer
skills.description: Render multi-compartment morphologies, receptor ports and soma/dendrite traces.

examples.output: No Cortexel scene — host d3 morphology tree with linked traces.
examples.note: scene:null — do not invent morphology geometry from labels.

skills.title: NEST state replay / animation storyboard renderer
skills.description: Render time-evolution storyboards and inspectable state replays.

examples.dataShape: frames, entities, metrics, frame rate, annotations
examples.output: Manim storyboard / source — no live Cortexel scene.
examples.note: scene:null — offline storyboard, not a real-time render target.
